job.title: Chiropractor - Sports and Wellness
job.description:
Company Description

We are local franchise, large management group in a multi-location setting. The practice has been established for 10+ years. The office is holistic/patient-centric. Our patient base is general wellness, with a focus in sports (Straight). Collaboration with other health professions is independent/respectful.

.

Job Description

We are hiring a Full-Time Doctor. Timing: 4-6 months. Multi-location: Required. Typical pace: 11-20 patients/day. Charting: comprehensive ehr. Care plans: flexible by progress. Patient preference: activator. Larger side-posture adjustments: No. We value a doctor who is compassionate. Support growth through health screenings, events/meetings, and other.

Common approaches/modalities include Thompson, Diversified, Other adjusting, E-Stim, and Heat/Cold. Familiarity with Gonstead, Activator, SOT, Ultrasound, and Other adjuncts is helpful

Qualifications

  • Licensing: Must be licensed.
  • Experience: 3-5 years.
  • Ideal-fit traits include: Adjustment-first, Balanced adjust+therapy, Community-active, Sports injury skilled, PI experienced, Geriatrics experienced, Full-time, EHR comfortable, Open-minded.
  • Priorities: Adjusting; Adjusting Ability.
  • Clinical approach alignment: philosophical-based = traditional + modern mix; evidence-based = symptom relief focus.
  • We are open to all qualified applicants.

Other Information

  • Salary range: $75,001 - $85,000 (including incentives in the base range).
  • Benefits may include CE.
  • Continuing education: Above minimum.

job.title: Chiropractor - Sports Focus
job.description:
Company Description

We are independent practice in a rural setting. The practice has been established for 10+ years. The office is holistic/patient-centric. Our patient base is general wellness, with a focus in sports (Wellness). Within the office we have other chiropractors, it is open concept with a large waiting room, Shared office, Shared staff, Treatment equipment, Computers.

Job Description

We are hiring a Full-Time Doctor. Timing: 1-3 months. Multi-location: Preferred but flexible. Typical pace: 21-30 patients/day. Charting: comprehensive ehr. Care plans: flexible by progress. Patient preference: gentle/low-impact. We value a doctor who is friendly and supports growth through educational talks. Common approaches are modalities and adjusting. Familiarity with Heat/Cold and other adjuncts is helpful.

Qualifications

  • Licensing: Preferably already state licensed or applied.
  • Relocation: Relocation assistance available.
  • Distance preference: Closer is better
  • Ideal-fit traits include: Adjustment-first, Community-active, Business-minded, High-volume comfortable, Full-time, EHR comfortable, Open-minded, Adjusting > personality.
  • Priorities: Character; Personality.
  • Clinical approach alignment: philosophical-based = traditional + modern mix; evidence-based = patient-feedback informed.
  • We are open to all qualified applicants.

Other Information

  • Salary range: $75,000 - $85,000 (including incentives in the base range).
  • Benefits may include Retirement and CE

job.title: Associate Chiropractor - Upper Cervical and Full-Spine
job.salary: $85,000+ (higher depending on experience, personality, and adjusting skill)

salary_detail.notes: $85,000+ (higher depending on experience, personality, and adjusting skill)

job.description:
Company Description

Established chiropractic practice focused on high-quality outcomes, strong doctor-patient relationships, and long-term growth. The clinic follows upper cervical-influenced protocols while delivering Activator and full-spine, hands-on care in a patient-centered environment.

Job Description

Associate Chiropractor role focused on patient relationships and continued practice growth, with long-term partnership or ownership potential for the right person

Provide hands-on, full-spine chiropractic care (upper cervical and activator-influenced protocols)

Build trust and long-term relationships through communication and care planning

Stay open minded to learn new skills and refine and expand clinical technique

Contribute to practice growth, patient experience, and team culture

Qualifications

  • Doctor of Chiropractic (D.C.) degree
  • Active or eligible chiropractic license
  • Strong hands-on adjusting skills
  • Open minded to learn new skills and adapt to protocols
  • Professional, dependable, and patient-centered
  • Entrepreneurial mindset (not a "punch-the-clock" mentality)

Other Information

  • Base salary: $85,000+ (higher depending on experience, personality, and adjusting skill)
  • Benefits: malpractice coverage, health insurance, retirement, CE opportunities
  • Growth path: partnership or ownership potential for the right chiropractor

job.title: Chiropractor - Focused General Wellness
job.salary: $95,001 and above (including incentives in the base range)

salary_detail.notes: $95,001 and above (including incentives in the base range)

job.description:
Company Description

We are independent practice, transitioning to management in a suburban setting. The practice has been established for 10+ years. The office is modern/high-tech. Our patient base is elderly pain-relief, with a focus in general wellness (Integrated). Collaboration with other health professions is independent/respectful.

Office features: Clinic manager, CA, Other doctors, Open concept, Own office, Own staff, Treatment equipment.

Job Description

We are hiring a Full-Time Doctor. Timing: Immediately. Multi-location: Single location only. Typical pace: 31+ patients/day. Charting: paper records. Care plans: detailed per-patient plan. Patient preference: We value a doctor who is assertive. Support growth through local associations, personal advertising, and not necessary.

Common approaches/modalities include Thompson, Diversified, E-Stim, Ultrasound, and other adjuncts. Familiarity with Gonstead, Activator, Computerized adjusting,

Clinic manager, CA, Other doctors, Open concept, Own office, Own staff, Treatment equipment. Marketing includes tv, radio, and word of mouth. Community involvement includes sponsoring events.

Qualifications

  • Licensing: Preferably licensed.
  • Boards/testing: Boards completed.
  • Experience: 3-5 years.
  • Distance preference: Closer is better.
  • Ideal-fit traits include: Balanced adjust+therapy, Community-active, Patient-care focused, PI experienced, High-volume comfortable, Full-time, Experience flexible, Open-minded, X-ray assessment, Personality > adjusting.
  • We are open to all qualified applicants.

Other Information

  • Salary range: $95,001 and above (including incentives in the base range).
  • Benefits may include Malpractice.
  • Continuing education: Minimum only.
  • Relocation: Relocation assistance available.

job.title: Chiropractor - General Wellness
job.description:
Company Description

Independent practice that has been established for 10+ years. The office is traditional/welcoming. Our patient base is general wellness,

Office features: CA, Other doctors, Private room, Large waiting room, Own office, Own staff, Treatment equipment.

Job Description

Full-Time Doctor that can start Immediately. Typical pace: 31+ patients/day. Charting: comprehensive ehr. Care plans: flexible by progress. Patient preference: hvla. We value a doctor who is friendly. Support growth through conferences, events/meetings, and not necessary.

Common approaches/modalities include Gonstead, Thompson, Diversified, E-Stim, Ultrasound, Heat/Cold, and Other adjuncts. Familiarity with Activator, SOT, and Other adjusting is helpful.

Qualifications

  • Licensing: Must be licensed. or applied for license
  • Experience: Open
  • Ideal-fit traits include: Balanced adjust+therapy, Community-active, Business-minded, PI experienced, Full-time, Experience flexible, EHR comfortable, Open-minded, Ortho testing, Personality > adjusting.
  • Clinical approach alignment: philosophical-based = holistic approach; evidence-based = patient-feedback informed.
  • We are open to all qualified applicants.

Other Information

  • Salary range: $75,001 - $85,000 (including incentives in the base range).
  • Benefits may include Health.
  • Continuing education: Above minimum.

job.title: LMT (Licensed Massage Therapist) - Patient Focused Wellness
job.salary: $30 - $60 a hour (about $60,000-$120,000 / yr) depending on experience

salary_detail.notes: $30 - $60 a hour (about $60,000-$120,000 / yr) depending on experience

job.description:
Company Description

Our chiropractic office blends clinical efficiency with holistic care. We prioritize a calm, clean, and collaborative work atmosphere where every staff member contributes to a supportive and respectful environment for patients and coworkers alike.

Job Description

Provide therapeutic massages as prescribed by the doctor.

Support therapy protocols and set up exercise equipment.

Help maintain treatment areas and ensure smooth clinic flow.

Qualifications

  • Active Washington Massage Therapy License (required).
  • Skilled with therapeutic modalities under clinical supervision.
  • Calm, professional, and team-oriented; punctual and reliable.
  • Open to structured procedures and continuing education.

Other Information

  • Part-time or full-time schedules available.
  • Daytime plus occasional evening hours.
  • Strong office culture with clear communication & respect for work-life balance.
  • Salary $30 - $60 a hour (about $60,000-$120,000 / yr) depending on experience.

job.title: Associate Chiropractor - Relationship-Driven Wellness Clinic
job.description:
Company Description

Our clinic thrives on strong patient relationships, consistent results, and a team environment where every provider's contribution matters. We integrate functional neurology principles alongside hands-on adjustments and complementary services to improve both structure and function.

Job Description

Perform tailored chiropractic adjustments based on individual needs.

Collaborate with other providers to enhance patient outcomes.

Guide patients through care plans with clarity and empathy.

Track progress and adapt strategies to ensure optimal results.

Maintain professional, timely, accurate documentation.

Qualifications

  • Doctor of Chiropractic (DC) and current (or in-process) state license.
  • Excellent communication and patient education skills.
  • Strong ethics and commitment to a high standard of care.
  • Ability to collaborate within a diverse healthcare team.
  • Background in functional neurology is highly desirable (or strong interest to learn).

Other Information

  • Compensation: Base + performance incentives, realistic range $85K-$100K.
  • Benefits: health insurance, malpractice coverage, CEU allowance, advancement tracks.
  • Modern facility near top schools, amenities, and outdoor recreation.

job.title: Experienced Associate Chiropractor
job.description:
Company Description

Join our state-of-the-art wellness practice located near Spring, Texas. Our open-concept, hands-on chiropractic clinic utilizes diversified, Thompson, and Activator techniques. We prioritize hands-on adjustments as the core of our treatment plans, supplemented with adjunct therapies as needed. Each patient receives an individualized care plan tailored to their specific needs.

Job Description

Deliver expert chiropractic adjustments using diversified, Thompson, and Activator techniques. Provide individualized, hands-on care for a diverse range of patients. Collaborate within a supportive, patient-centered team environment.

Qualifications

  • Active Texas chiropractic license (or application in process).
  • Humble, skilled adjuster with strong commitment to patient outcomes.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Other Information

  • Compensation: Base salary $87,000 annually + signing bonus.
  • Comprehensive insurance package included.
  • Relocation stipend available for the right candidate.

job.title: Chiropractor-First Wellness Center - Join Our Collaborative Team
job.salary: $85,000-$100,000 per year + incentives (competitive base + performance incentives)

salary_detail.notes: $85,000-$100,000 per year + incentives (competitive base + performance incentives)

job.description:
Company Description

Join a chiropractor-led, adjustment-forward practice in the Birmingham metro area where clinical decision-making is respected and patient outcomes drive everything. Our team blends high-skill hands-on chiropractic with supportive rehab and wellness services-added only when they truly strengthen results. You'll work alongside professionals who communicate well, share ideas easily, and keep the culture grounded, upbeat, and patient-first.

Job Description

Deliver precise, individualized spinal and extremity adjustments as the foundation of care when clinically indicated. Build smart, streamlined care plans-integrating rehab and supportive modalities (laser, PT-style exercise, regenerative options, etc.) only when they meaningfully enhance the outcome. Educate patients in practical spine-health habits, ergonomics, and lifestyle strategies that reduce flare-ups and improve long-term function. Document clearly and efficiently to support continuity of care and clinical quality. Contribute to clinical protocols and team workflows-your voice matters here.

Qualifications

  • Active (or soon-to-be active) Alabama chiropractic license.
  • Strong adjusting confidence with an "adjustment-first" care philosophy.
  • Team-minded, collaborative communication style and comfort with patient education.
  • New grads welcome (structured mentorship available) as well as experienced DCs.

Other Information

  • Compensation: $85,000-$100,000 per year + incentives (competitive base + performance incentives).
  • Benefits may include health coverage, malpractice support, CEU allowance, and clear paths for growth.
  • Modern clinic setting in the Birmingham area with access to dining, neighborhoods, and outdoor recreation-without the "corporate" feel.

job.title: Associate Chiropractor - Wellness & Functional Neurology
job.description:
Company Description

Our Philadelphia wellness clinic restores balance and optimizes the body's ability to heal by combining the art of chiropractic with the science of functional neurology. We address both structure and function to help patients achieve pain relief and long-term vitality.

Job Description

Deliver individualized chiropractic adjustments as the foundation of care. Integrate functional neurology concepts to enhance outcomes. Educate and motivate patients on lifestyle habits that support nervous system balance. Collaborate with other providers on comprehensive care plans. Document care thoroughly and contribute to case reviews.

Qualifications

  • Deliver individualized chiropractic adjustments as the foundation of care.
  • Integrate functional neurology concepts to enhance outcomes.
  • Educate and motivate patients on lifestyle habits that support nervous system balance.
  • Collaborate with other providers on comprehensive care plans.
  • Document care thoroughly and contribute to case reviews.

Other Information

  • Compensation: Base + performance incentives, realistic range $85K-$100K.
  • Benefits: Health insurance, malpractice coverage, CEU allowance, and advancement opportunities.
  • Modern wellness facility with access to Philadelphia's cultural amenities, dining, and outdoor recreation.

job.title: Functional Neurology-Speciality Focused Chiropractor
job.description:
Company Description

Our clinic, located near the Main Line, blends the art of chiropractic with the science of functional neurology to restore balance and optimize health.

Job Description

Provide personalized chiropractic adjustments as the primary element of patient care. Apply functional neurology principles to improve outcomes and promote nervous system stability. Guide patients in adopting healthy lifestyle practices, wellness routines, and preventive strategies. Work closely with a collaborative healthcare team to develop and carry out integrated treatment plans. Maintain detailed clinical notes and actively participate in case reviews and team meetings.

Qualifications

  • Licensed (or license-eligible) Doctor of Chiropractic (DC) in Pennsylvania.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication abilities.
  • Commitment to high standards of care, ethical practice, and ongoing professional growth.
  • Background or coursework in functional neurology is a plus; strong interest and willingness to train are equally valued.

Other Information

  • Compensation: Base + performance incentives, expected range $85,000-$100,000.
  • Benefits: health insurance, malpractice coverage, CEU allowance, advancement opportunities.
  • Modern, patient-focused facility with easy access to the amenities of the Main Line and greater Philadelphia area.

job.title: Front Desk & Clinical Support - Chiropractic Clinic
job.salary: $16-$24 per hour ( about $33,000-$50,000/yr), depending on experience

salary_detail.notes: $16-$24 per hour ( about $33,000-$50,000/yr), depending on experience

job.description:
Company Description

We are a chiropractic clinic that values precision, professionalism, and consistency while providing a welcoming environment for patients of all ages.

Job Description

Handle scheduling, patient check-ins, intake forms, and billing inquiries.
Maintain accurate EMR records and prepare therapy equipment. Keep treatment rooms organized; monitor supplies; assist with reminders. Uphold confidentiality and support efficient clinic flow.

Qualifications

  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Organized, dependable, and detail-oriented.
  • Comfortable with scheduling software and EMR systems.
  • Intake experience; insurance verification a plus.

Other Information

  • Pay: $16-$24 per hour ( about $33,000-$50,000/yr), depending on experience.

job.title: Performance & Wellness Chiropractor
job.description:
Company Description

Our established chiropractic clinic has served the community for more than a decade and is located on the outskirts of Boston in a smaller-town setting. The practice maintains a holistic, patient-centered atmosphere with a strong emphasis on wellness care and sports-focused patients. We operate in a collaborative environment alongside other chiropractors and offer shared staff support, treatment equipment, computer systems, and a spacious reception area.

Job Description

We are currently seeking a Full-Time Chiropractor to join our growing practice within the next 1-3 months. The office maintains a steady patient flow while emphasizing quality care and patient relationships. Care plans are tailored to patient progress.

We are looking for a doctor who is personable, growth-oriented, and comfortable participating in patient education and community engagement. Our clinic combines chiropractic adjustments with supportive therapies and values providers familiar with adjunctive modalities.

Key Details:

Average patient volume: 21-30 patients daily
Comprehensive EHR/charting system
Modalities and adjusting both commonly utilized
Familiarity with Heat/Cold therapies and other adjunctive therapies

Qualifications

  • Adjustment-focused clinician
  • Community-oriented and personable
  • Business-minded and growth-focused
  • Open-minded and team-oriented
  • Full-time availability preferred
  • Values strong adjusting ability alongside professionalism

Other Information

  • Salary range: $75,000-$85,000 including incentives
  • Potential retirement benefits
  • Continuing education support may be available
  • Open to all experience levels

job.title: Functional Wellness Chiropractor
job.description:
Company Description

Independent chiropractic practice serving the community for more than a decade. The clinic offers a traditional and welcoming atmosphere with a wellness-focused patient base and an established flow of returning patients. The office environment encourages collaboration while still allowing doctors professional autonomy in patient care.

Office features: Dedicated CA support, Multiple doctors on-site, Private treatment rooms, Spacious reception area, Personal office space, Individual staff assistance, Therapy and rehab equipment.

Job Description

Seeking a Full-Time Chiropractor for an immediate opening in a busy, wellness-oriented practice averaging 30+ patient visits daily. The office places a strong emphasis on hands-on HVLA adjusting approaches, with commonly utilized techniques including Diversified, Gonstead, and Thompson. Therapies may include E-Stim, Ultrasound, Heat/Cold therapy, and additional supportive modalities. Familiarity with other adjusting styles is considered beneficial. The ideal candidate is personable, dependable, and committed to delivering patient-focused care.

Qualifications

  • Active Tennessee license or currently applying for licensure
  • Experience level open - new graduates encouraged to apply
  • Comfortable in a fast-paced patient environment
  • Strong communication and patient relationship skills
  • Community-minded and team-oriented personality
  • Confidence with orthopedic testing and wellness-based care
  • Open-minded clinical approach with patient-focused care philosophy
  • Personal injury experience considered a plus

Other Information

  • Compensation package approximately $75,000-$85,000 annually including incentives
  • Potential health-related benefits available
  • Continuing education support beyond minimum requirements
  • Opportunities for conferences, meetings, and professional development events

job.title: Part-Time Chiropractor
job.description:
Company Description

We are independent practice in a suburban setting. The practice has been established for 10+ years. The office is traditional/welcoming. Our patient base is General with a focus in accident recovery. Collaboration with other health professions is collaborative. Familiarity with Drop Table, Diversified, Activator, Graston, Flexion -Distraction, E-Stim, Heat/Cold, is helpful. Office features: Staff, Private adjusting room, Large waiting room, Shared office, Shared staff, Own staff, Treatment equipment. Marketing includes insurance panels, building signage, and word of mouth.

Job Description

We are hiring a Part-Time Doctor, if well received by patients and your schedual fills you can transition to full time. Candidate will need to qualify for insurance panels. Timing: 1-3 months. Single location. Typical pace: 11-20 patients/day. Charting: Chiro-Touch, Care plans: flexible by progress. Patient preference: no preference. Larger patient side-posture adjustments: not required. We value a doctor who is friendly. Support growth through brochure and word of mouth.

Qualifications

  • Licensing: Must be licensed.
  • Boards/testing: Boards completed.
  • Experience: No requirement.
  • Relocation: Must already reside.
  • Distance preference: No preference.
  • Evaluation: In-person.
  • Ideal-fit traits include: Balanced adjust+therapy, Business-minded, PI experienced, Peds experienced, Geriatrics experienced, Full-time, Part-time, EHR comfortable, Personality > adjusting.
  • Priorities: Character; Personality.
  • Clinical approach alignment: philosophical-based = innate healing emphasis; evidence-based = research-supported.
  • We are open to all qualified applicants.

Other Information

  • Salary range: $25,000 base + percentage (including incentives in the base range).
  • Benefits may include CE.
  • Continuing education: Minimum only.
